name: ColorPicker
description: Canvas-based OKLCH color picker with a hue ring and an inner 2D lightness/chroma crosshair. Supports dual-mode API: hex string (value) or decomposed OKLCH (hue/lightness/chroma). Renders as swatch+ring inline, or swatch-triggered popover ring.
whenToUse: When users need to select a color with full hue, lightness, and chroma control in a single compact widget.
avoidWhen: When the user needs to pick from a predefined set of colors - use a Select or RadioGroup with color swatches instead.
accessibilityRequirements: label prop is required for the hue slider
Keyboard (hue): Arrow keys ±1 (±10 with Shift), Home/End jump to 0/359
Keyboard (L/C): Up/Down adjust lightness ±0.01 (±0.1 with Shift), Left/Right adjust chroma ±0.005 (±0.05 with Shift)
role="slider" on canvas for hue and on hidden div for L/C

value.description: Current color as hex string (bindable). Dual-mode: use value OR hue/lightness/chroma.

size.description: Ring outer diameter in base units (1bu = --sg-base-unit). Overridden by ringSize.

ringSize.description: Ring outer diameter in base units (overrides size for the ring).

swatchSize.description: Swatch size in base units (inline swatch or trigger swatch). Defaults to ~20% of ringSize when inline.

label.description: Accessible label for the hue slider.

showValue.description: Display current value as read-only text (hex or OKLCH depending on mode).

input.description: Enable editable value inputs (hex in value mode; L/C/H numeric inputs in OKLCH mode).

mode.description: Rendering mode. inline shows ring + swatch together; popover shows swatch/value and opens ring on click.

direction.description: Direction of ring placement relative to swatch (inline) or popover placement (popover mode).

onchange.description: Fires with { hex, hue, lightness, chroma } on each change.

route.label: ColorPicker
route.description: Canvas OKLCH color picker with hue ring and L/C area

examples.title: Hex Mode with Value
examples.code:
<sg-color-picker
  value={hexValue}
  label="Pick a color"
  show-value
  onchange={(e) => {
    const d = ((e as CustomEvent<any>).detail ?? { hex: (e.currentTarget as any).value });
    hexValue = d.hex;
  }}
/>

examples.title: OKLCH Mode with Value
examples.code: <sg-color-picker hue={240} lightness={0.7} chroma={0.15} label="OKLCH color" show-value />

examples.title: Hex Input
examples.code:
<sg-color-picker
  value={hexValue}
  label="Pick a color"
  input
  onchange={(e) => {
    const d = ((e as CustomEvent<any>).detail ?? { hex: (e.currentTarget as any).value });
    hexValue = d.hex;
  }}
/>

examples.title: Compact (Swatch + Popover + Input)
examples.code:
<sg-color-picker
  value={compactValue}
  mode="popover"
  input
  label="Pick a color"
  onchange={(e) => {
    const d = ((e as CustomEvent<any>).detail ?? { hex: (e.currentTarget as any).value });
    compactValue = d.hex;
  }}
/>
